channel.title: AI·Brief — Daily Tech Intelligence
channel.description: Automated AI-powered tech news briefings updated every 3 hours.

item.title: Nvidia RTX Spark Era: Surface Laptop Ultra Unveiled
item.description: Microsoft's Surface Laptop Ultra showcases Nvidia's AI-first platform. Early impressions highlight its innovative hardware features.

item.title: Wolverine Game Developers Reveal New Features
item.description: Developers discuss gameplay, X-Men cameos, and a low-gore option for the upcoming Wolverine game. Exciting details emerge from the latest trailer.

item.title: Rayman Legends Retold Aims for 60 FPS on Switch 2
item.description: Ubisoft announces Rayman Legends Retold for Nintendo Switch 2, promising 60 FPS and content parity with other platforms. A beloved classic returns with new features.

item.title: Siri in iOS 27: New Features Unveiled
item.description: iOS 27 introduces significant enhancements to Siri, focusing on smarter interactions and improved functionality. Users can expect a more intuitive experience.

item.title: Onimusha: Way of the Sword Launches September 25
item.description: Capcom announces Onimusha: Way of the Sword for PS5, Xbox Series, and PC, with a demo available now. The game launches on September 25.

item.title: KEMURI Set for 2027 Release on PS5, PC
item.description: KEMURI, a yokai possession action game, is set to launch in 2027 for PS5 and PC. Developed by Ikumi Nakamura's studio UNSEEN, anticipation builds.

item.title: Tomb Raider Legacy of Atlantis Listed for 2027
item.description: Amazon reveals Tomb Raider Legacy of Atlantis for Steam, set to release on February 10, 2027. This reimagining of the classic game excites fans.

item.title: Classic Toy Story Games Coming to Switch
item.description: Digital Eclipse announces classic Toy Story games for Nintendo Switch 1 and 2 this year, celebrating the franchise's 30th anniversary. Nostalgia meets modern gaming.

item.title: Pokémon GO Updates Impact PvE Raids
item.description: The latest Pokémon GO updates enhance moves for PvE raids, affecting gameplay strategies. New attack availability reshapes the meta for players.

item.title: Star Fox Multiplayer Mode Impresses on Switch 2
item.description: Hands-on preview of Star Fox on Switch 2 reveals an exciting multiplayer mode. The game retains its classic charm while introducing new features.

item.title: Foldable iPhone Ultra Features Liquid Metal Hinge
item.description: Apple's upcoming foldable iPhone Ultra will feature a liquid metal hinge, with prototypes shipped for testing. This innovation promises enhanced durability.

item.title: Silent Hill: Townfall ESRB Rating Revealed
item.description: Silent Hill: Townfall receives its ESRB rating ahead of the State of Play event. Anticipation builds for this horror title's release.

item.title: Intel's Arc G3 Extreme SoC Pricing Concerns
item.description: Intel warns of high pricing for its Arc G3 Extreme SoC, designed for handheld gaming. Performance and efficiency details are also highlighted.

item.title: Toyota Unveils 2027 GR86 with New Features
item.description: Toyota reveals the 2027 GR86, featuring a new Thunder Gray paint and improved performance. The lightest car in its lineup gets exciting updates.

item.title: ASUS Advances AI in Healthcare at Computex 2026
item.description: ASUS showcases AI-driven healthcare solutions at Computex 2026, enhancing clinical decision-making with innovative tools. Key products include Handheld Ultrasound DuoScan and VivoWatch 6 Plus.
